dBdC
	build_extz8build C/C++ extensions (compile/link to build directory)z
 (separated by '%s'))
build-lib=
bz(directory for compiled extension modules)
build-temp=
tz1directory for temporary files (build by-products)z
plat-name=
pz>platform name to cross-compile for, if supported (default: %s))
inplace
iziignore build-lib and put compiled extensions into the source directory alongside your pure Python modulesz
include-dirs=
Iz.list of directories to search for header files)
define=
C preprocessor macros to define)
undef=
Uz!C preprocessor macros to undefine)
libraries=
lz!external C libraries to link withz
library-dirs=
Lz.directories to search for external C libraries)
rpath=
Rz7directories to search for shared C libraries at runtime)
link-objects=
Oz2extra explicit link objects to include in the link)
debug
gz'compile/link with debugging information)
force
fz2forcibly build everything (ignore file timestamps))
z	compiler=
specify the compiler type)
z	parallel=
number of parallel build jobs)
swig-cppNz)make SWIG create C++ files (default is C))
swig-opts=Nz!list of SWIG command line options)
swig=Nz
path to the SWIG executable)
userNz#add user include, library and rpath)
help-compilerNz
list available compilersc
